calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Pauline S. Self, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Maria Ascarrunz Eduardo and Vicopex, S.R.L.
No appearance by defendants Harold Fourinier, Credit Consult International, LLC or Michael Beck.
Defaults were entered against all three defendants on September 22, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed January 23, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed today, June 24, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Maria Ascarrunz Eduardo and Vicopex, S.R.L., and against the Defaulted Defendants Harold Fourinier, Credit Consult International, LLC and Michael Beck as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43.000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,008.33.
Attorney's Fees - $10,975.00.
Costs - $922.23, for a total judgment in the amount of $78,905.56.
